intro:

Zeocriton murinum is a type of marine alga, specifically a brown alga, which is a type of seaweed that belongs to the phylum Heterokontophyta. While I couldn't find specific health benefits associated with Zeocriton murinum, some marine algae like it have been reported to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities.
